summary: The story concludes with Elric, a master of the Way of the Egui, reflecting on his past adventures and relationships. He reunites with his friends in the north, including his brother Paul, who is struggling to become the next Blue Lion. Meanwhile, Lady Isabel has yet to contact Elric about her favor, prompting him to worry about their relationship. The chapter ends with a group of characters setting off on a journey together.
key_moments: Elric reunites with his friends in the north
Paul struggles to become the next Blue Lion
Lady Isabel's absence and Elric's concern about their relationship
